title: malleastrum mocquerysii
intro: Malleastrum mocquerysii, also known as the African sandalwood or yellow sandalwood, is a plant species native to Madagascar, belonging to the family Rutaceae. The medicinal properties of Malleastrum mocquerysii include its essential oil, which has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as inflammation, fever, and digestive problems. The health benefits associated with this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce stress, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. Malleastrum mocquerysii can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which are used in traditional medicine to alleviate various health conditions.
